item.title: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 20 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 125.75, down 7.3% from the previous close. This sharp fall contrasts with the broader market’s modest gains, reflecting immediate price pressures and a shift in market sentiment surrounding the stock. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Graphite India Ltd. Rallies 7.48% and Surpasses All Major Moving Averages — Momentum Gains Steam
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.37% on 20 Apr 2026, yet Graphite India Ltd. surged 7.48%, outperforming its sector by 3.45 percentage points. This strong single-session gain stands out as a decisive move well above its key moving averages, signalling a robust technical momentum rather than a mere bounce. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 388.5, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. DEE Development Engineers Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 20 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 4.86% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 22.11, R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd locked at its lower circuit on 20 Apr 2026, falling 4.86% within a 5% price band. Sellers were lined up to exit, but buyers were absent, leaving unfilled supply and a frozen price that halted further decline. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Gretex Corporate Services Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 6.3% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 362.1, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Gretex Corporate Services Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 10% on 20 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Indian Energy Exchange Ltd (IEX) witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of directional bets and market sentiment. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Ort​el Communications Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 5% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 1.72, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Ort​el Communications Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5% on 20 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling a pronounced imbalance in supply and demand. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.95% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 5.73, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Gujarat Lease Financing Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.95% on 20 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Rally
item.description: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, coinciding with a robust price rally that has propelled the stock to a fresh 52-week high. This sudden increase in open interest, coupled with rising volumes and sustained gains, signals a notable shift in market positioning and investor sentiment towards the heavy electrical equipment giant. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Dish TV India Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 4.41% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 3.88, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Dish TV India Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 4.41% on 20 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, reflecting persistent selling pressure in a micro-cap stock with limited liquidity. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd (MOTILALOFS) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened investor activity and shifting market positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector peers with a 1.19% gain today, supported by robust volume and rising delivery volumes, reflecting growing investor confidence despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Sell. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Ather Energy Ltd Sees Robust Value Trading Amid Sector Outperformance
item.description: Ather Energy Ltd, a prominent player in the Indian automobile sector, witnessed significant trading activity on 20 Apr 2026, emerging as one of the highest value stocks on the bourses. The electric vehicle manufacturer outperformed its sector peers and broader market indices, buoyed by strong institutional interest and a notable reversal in price trend after a brief decline. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Yes Bank Ltd. Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amidst Positive Market Momentum
item.description: Yes Bank Ltd. has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock’s recent performance, combined with increased volumes and a positive directional bias, suggests renewed interest from traders and investors alike in this mid-cap private sector bank. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amid Strong Price Gains
item.description: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd (APOLLO), a small-cap player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume on 20 Apr 2026, accompanied by a robust price rally that outperformed its sector and broader market indices. The stock’s sustained upward momentum and heightened investor participation signal a notable shift in market sentiment. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Jyoti CNC Automation Ltd (JYOTICNC), a small-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 20 April 2026. The stock recorded a significant intraday rally, outperforming its sector and broader market indices, driven by strong investor interest despite mixed technical indicators and a recent downgrade in its mojo rating. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 1,350 Puts — 1.5% Below Current Price — Draw 8,554 Contracts on Reliance Industries Ltd
item.description: The stock is trading at Rs 1,370.80, yet nearly 8,554 put contracts have been traded at strikes Rs 1,350 and Rs 1,360 ahead of the 28 April expiry. This concentrated activity just below the current price suggests a nuanced options market positioning in Reliance Industries Ltd, where protection and strategic hedging appear to be key themes rather than outright bearish bets. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: 10,118 Call Contracts Traded on Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. as Stock Hits New 52-Week High
item.description: On 20 Apr 2026, Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. witnessed a surge in call option activity with 10,118 contracts traded at the Rs 330 strike, closely aligned with the stock’s closing price of Rs 332.12. This synchronisation between the derivatives and cash markets underscores a strong directional conviction as the stock also marked a fresh 52-week high. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Vivimed Labs Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 5% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 7.37, Vivimed Labs Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5% on 20 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price. Sellers were lined up to exit, but buyers were absent, creating a supply glut that halted further declines. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amidst Strong Price Rally
item.description: Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd. (BHEL), a key player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume on 20 Apr 2026, accompanied by a robust price rally that pushed the stock to a new 52-week high. This surge reflects renewed investor interest and signals a potential shift in market sentiment for the mid-cap company. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd Surges on High Value Trading Amid Institutional Interest
item.description: Sterling & Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd (SWSOLAR) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 20 Apr 2026, registering a remarkable 13.61% gain in a volatile session. Despite a strong intraday rally, the stock remains under pressure from a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating, reflecting a complex interplay of institutional interest and market sentiment within the construction sector. Time: 5 minutes ago
